case_title: SADRIENA JONES et al VS. LA SALL APARTMENTS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
